plan: The FieldError is raised at resolve time by BaseExpression._resolve_output_field, but the datetime-minus-datetime -> TemporalSubtraction (and mixed-duration -> DurationExpression) detection currently lives only in CombinedExpression.as_sql, too late to influence output_field inference. Move that connector/internal-type check into CombinedExpression.resolve_expression so F('end') - F('start') resolves to a TemporalSubtraction (output_field=DurationField) up front, making the subsequent + Value(timedelta) combine cleanly without ExpressionWrapper. This is purely a shared expression-layer resolve-time bug, so unlike the emulated-duration crash no backend operations files need touching (subtract_temporals hooks already exist).
